text:
Type of wheelchair or scooter (Interim Perf) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's type of wheelchair used to wheel 150 feet during this assessment period plus the two previous calendar days. 1=Manual
2=Motorized effective 10/01/2023
908 PAIN_HURT_FREQ_CD PAIN_HURT_FREQ_CD J0410 Pain Frequency CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency at which the resident has experienced pain or hurting over the last five days. 1=Rarely or not at all
2=Occasionally
3=Frequently
